name: Peanut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, corn syrup, sugar, and baking chocolate in a heavy 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue cooking over medium heat until the candy reaches the soft ball stage (236°F) on the candy thermometer. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
4. Remove from the heat and add the butter.
5. Cool to 110°F without stirring.
6. Add the vanilla and beat until the fudge begins to lose its shine.
7. Stir in the peanuts.
8. Quickly pour into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
9. Cut into squares when completely cooled. Makes 1 1/2 pounds.
